text:

Subject: Re: docs/1110: Reference to an obsolete doc in share/doc/handbook/dialup.sgml
Date: Sun, 31 Mar 1996 19:02:38 +0200 (MET DST)

> Ok, thanks, i'm going to commit a fix.  I've also left an explanation
> in the `kernel config' section to cover the new options scheme.
    Thanks for your work.
     Now i'm involved in a project to make Japanese translation of
handbook and dialup.sgml is one of the files I'm translating.  So I
may find some more typo's or things like that as I go on.  I will
send-pr as I find them.  I appreciate your work, really. 

     Thanks again.
